productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Stylish Gold Flats
description: Look all the more elegant with this stylish pair of slippers from carlton london. Designed to enhance your feminine side, this pair looks fabulous when teamed with jeans and an ethnic top, or simply stylish ethnic wear.UpperStrapped upper with criss-crossing strap panels in the forefootAnkle strap with tang clasp for comfort and to lock the foot in placeMidsolePU midsole for durability and comfortSmooth and mildly cushioned footbed for protectionOutsoleTPR outsole for enhanced durability and comfortHorizontal grooves on the forefoot and heel for grip and stabilityKitten heel unit for style and comfortshoe careWipe surface using a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
